reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Gate 1: Function is registered as active P2P RPC handler (rpc.go:55), not dead code. Gate 2: Entry point is untrusted P2P network, not a trusted source. Gate 3: In scope - PeerDAS (EIP-7594) is part of Fusaka upgrade. An attacker can trigger this via P2P network by sending DataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest with startSlot < minValidSlot or > currentSlot, causing the server to return success (0x00) with empty data instead of ResourceUnavailable (0x03), violating the P2P spec requirement for out-of-range requests.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Consensus Specs - PeerDAS P2P interface (EIP-7594): DataColumnSidecarsByRange must return ResourceUnavailable for requests outside data_column_serve_range
